extracted.title: Construction and Maintenance Schedule Posting
extracted.description:
As a courtesy, Columbia Gulf Transmission, LLC (CGT) hereby notifies customers the Construction and Maintenance Schedule posted under "Construction and Maintenance" on the Informational Postings website has been updated. CGT reminds customers to please check the Maintenance Schedule on a regular basis.

The current schedule has been updated to reflect maintenance activity on the following:

* Revised end date – Corinth Compressor Station Unit 507 maintenance – January 6 – March 27, 2026 (Previously scheduled to end on March 20, 2026)
* Revised dates – West Lateral-100 Pigging – March 27-30, 2026 (Previously scheduled for March 26-31, 2026)
* Revised dates – Centerville Compressor Station Unit 1201 maintenance – April 28-29, 2026 (Previously scheduled for April 15-16, 2026)
* Clifton Junction Compressor Station Unit 2502 maintenance – April 28-30, 2026
* Means LDAR Pipeline maintenance – July – August 2026
* Revised end date – Venice MS 595 maintenance – August 10-29, 2026 (Previously scheduled to end on August 18, 2026)
* Hampshire Compressor Station Unit 412 maintenance – August 27 – November 12, 2026
* East Lateral-200 Pigging from Rayne Compressor Station to VS 1204 – December 1-3, 2026
* Hampshire Compressor Station Unit 413 maintenance – January – March 2027

Additionally, the following file(s) can be located on Informational Postings under Construction and Maintenance
CGT Construction and Maintenance Schedule 03-19-2026.pdf
affectedLocations: East Lateral-200 (Rayne Compressor Station to VS 1204)
